'''dafodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacetylation|reacetylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacetylation|reacetylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dafodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæfedeth|dæfedeth]] || [[word:dæfedej|dæfedej]] || [[word:dæfedesh|dæfedesh]] || [[word:dæfede|dæfede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafofodoth|dafofodoth]] || [[word:dafofodoj|dafofodoj]] || [[word:dafofodosh|dafofodosh]] || [[word:dafofodo|dafofodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafodoth|dafodoth]] || [[word:dafodoj|dafodoj]] || [[word:dafodosh|dafodosh]] || [[word:dafodo|dafodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafofdoth|dafofdoth]] || [[word:dafofdoj|dafofdoj]] || [[word:dafofdosh|dafofdosh]] || [[word:dafofdof|dafofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dafodotho|dafodotho]] || [[word:dafodojo|dafodojo]] || [[word:dafodosho|dafodosho]] || [[word:dafodoko|dafodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dafodoth|dafodoth]] || [[word:dafodoj|dafodoj]] || [[word:dafodosh|dafodosh]] || [[word:dafodo|dafodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dafodothol|dafodothol]] || [[word:dafodojol|dafodojol]] || [[word:dafodoshol|dafodoshol]] || [[word:dafodokol|dafodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dafodothotho|dafodothotho]] || [[word:dafodojojo|dafodojojo]] || [[word:dafodoshosho|dafodoshosho]] || [[word:dafodoko|dafodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dafodothon|dafodothon]] || [[word:dafodojon|dafodojon]] || [[word:dafodoshon|dafodoshon]] || [[word:dafodokon|dafodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dafodothoro|dafodothoro]] || [[word:dafodojoro|dafodojoro]] || [[word:dafodoshoro|dafodoshoro]] || [[word:dafodokoro|dafodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
